name: Chile Grande with Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean stew meat, finely chopped
1 lb Rind of cooked ham, ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt bacon fat in a heavy pan.
2. Brown chopped onion and celery in the pan.
3. Add meat and brown it.
4. Add ham rind and cover well with water.
5. Add all other ingredients and bring to a boil.
6. Add dried beans, lower heat, and cook slowly until beans are done.
7. Add water as needed.
8. Remove some of the cooked beans, mash them, and return to chili to tighten it.
9. Stir to smooth the consistency.
10. Serve hot.
